/CAL:SENTENCE/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY ADMITTED TO VIOLATION OF PAROLE/PAJ:150 DAYS/X:WITHOUT TIME LOST/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 51 DAYS/4019HALF/X:BALANCE OFPETITION IS DISMISSED/X:THERE IS NO RESTITUTION IN THIS CASE (ITEMS STOLENRETURNED TO STORE)/SA2:BURBERRY STORE AT 225 POST ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW  INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT/

/X:PAROLE PHC/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT VIA ZOOM/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #1 - ABSCONDING; #2 - GRANDTHEFT; #3 - FAIL TO REPORT TO GPS/3000REIN/X:VIOLATION #4 - FAIL TO REGISTER 290PC WILL BE DISMISSED AT TIME OF SENTENCE ALONG WITH CRT #22003091//X RESTITUTION WILL BE DETERMINED AT THE TIME OF SENTENCE/
/CAL:3056 PTR/X:DA AND PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM/PDP/WIAPTR/X:PAROLEE DENIES ALLEGATIONS/X:PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/CONTD:PAROLE PHC/DOP/
